name: Chocolate Raspberry Bars
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper Preparation Time: 0:20
In a bowl, combine flour and confectioners' sugar; cut in butter until crumbly. Press into an ungreased 9 inch square baking pan. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 18 minutes or until browned. Spread jam over warm crust. In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and milk until smooth. Add vanilla chips; beat until smooth. Spread carefully over jam layer. Cool completely. Chill until set, about 1 hour. For glaze, melt chocolate chips and shortening; spread over filling. Chill for 10 minutes. Cut into bars; chill another hour. Store in the refrigerator.
